category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a character graphics/TUI library; official GitHub README describes Notcurses as a library for complex TUIs on modern terminal emulators.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is notcurses; official GitHub README title is Notcurses.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official dankwiki page; official GitHub README references the wiki, man pages, Doxygen output, and in-repo documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated; repo intentionally returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official GitHub README identify a terminal UI graphics library; official GitHub topics include c, cli, terminal, and ncurses.
